title: FlagApples
description: This mod adds Flag Apples. (Apples as country flags, but with special powers)
body:
This mod adds Flag types of Apples into Minecraft 1.18! 
Ranging from European Flag apples to Antarctica, excluding African Flag apples!
Are you ready for the survival of the "Curses & Blessings"? 

Apples (types):
- Europe
- Asia
- South America
- Australia & Oceania
- North America
- Antarctica


Curses:
- Zombies
- Powdered Snow
- Hunger or Poison and more

Blessings:
- IKEA stuff
- Strength, Health Boost, Absorption, etc.




The mod is made in MCreator.
MCreator is a free Minecraft Mod Making software, where you can make Plug-ins, Mods (for Forge & Fabric), Datapacks & more!
https://mcreator.net/
